data.body:
LANDED + CLOSED (signed). Gerrit change 733 (LLM-Review +1, Verified +1, 0 unresolved)
submitted → main ba2fb1dd4. Completion verifier PASSED and signed the close.

End-to-end confirmation: the post-merge branch-CI run for the landed commit
(29529230641) shows `lint + type-check` = SUCCESS — the exact job that failed on 6/6
prior main pushes is now green. Drift resolved: the branch-only no-commit-to-branch
hook is skipped in both CI runners, and the new parity guard prevents the
context-drift class from recurring.

(Note: the full run's pytest tier may still flake on the SEPARATE, already-filed bug
childsafe-special-springtail — `could not parse HEAD` under xdist — which is unrelated
to this fix.)
